chunks.text: Synopsys Software - UCB EECS License Synopsys Software - UCB EECS License public page Synopsys licenses are available within EECS on an EECS instructional license server. Access is limited to students and employees in EECS classes and research

ents and employees in EECS classes and research groups on EECS subnets. Computers in EECS instructional labs access these licenses. Faculty, grad students and staff with funded EECS accounts may get license information here for their own compu

y get license information here for their own computers (login with your EECS LDAP account and password) Please see synopsys.help for more information about Synopsys tools on the EECS instructional computers. EECS Instructional Support Group (ISG)
